items.title: Segway’s newest Navimow X430 robotic lawn mower is down at $2,299 with ongoing Earth Day savings, more from $679
items.summary:
Segway currently has an ongoing Navimow Earth Day Sale with up to $349 savings on its robotic lawn mowers, as well as a special Spin-to-Win promotional game that could give you extra savings or even a completely FREE X4 series robot mower. Speaking of the newest series, this sale is offering the Segway Navimow X430 Robotic Lawn Mower down at $2,299 shipped, matching its Amazon storefront pricing. Dropping down from a $2,499 price tag, this model launched at $2,249 back in February while the previous month’s Spring Sale saw it down at this same rate. While you might be able to win a coupon to its lowest price, you’re getting the next-best rate here during this sale that gives you a highly advanced autonomous mower at $200 off, and which has been serving my parents in their older age since going hands-on in my latest review. You can browse the full lineup of this sale’s deals by heading below or heading to the main landing page here.

Now, that low is finally appearing in 2026 for the first time, giving you $600 off the e-bike’s tag and $679 in total savings for the best price and best bundle package we have tracked to date.
